/usr/bin/c++   -I/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/9/include -fexceptions -DENABLE_LLVM_SHARED=1 -I/usr/lib/llvm-10/include -std=c++14   -fno-exceptions -D_GNU_SOURCE -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS    -L/usr/lib/llvm-10/lib -lLLVM-10 CMakeFiles/Inv.dir/main.cpp.o  -o ../bin/Inv  -Wl,--start-group -lclang -lclangAST -lclangAnalysis -lclangBasic -lclangDriver -lclangEdit -lclangIndex -lclangFrontend -lclangFrontendTool -lclangLex -lclangParse -lclangSema -lclangEdit -lclangASTMatchers -lclangRewrite -lclangRewriteFrontend -lclangStaticAnalyzerFrontend -lclangStaticAnalyzerCheckers -lclangStaticAnalyzerCore -lclangSerialization -lclangToolingCore -lclangTooling -lLLVM-10 -lLLVMSupport -Wl,--end-group Stingx/liblstingx.a Frontend/libFrontend.a -lclangIndex -lclangFrontend -lclangFrontendTool -lclangLex -lclangParse -lclangSema -lclangASTMatchers -lclangRewrite -lclangRewriteFrontend -lclangStaticAnalyzerFrontend -lclangStaticAnalyzerCheckers -lclangStaticAnalyzerCore -lclangSerialization -lclangToolingCore -lclangTooling -lLLVM-10 -lLLVMSupport -lppl -lgmpxx -lgmp
